common.tagline: From the venue to your wallet.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Login with your email and password

signUp.title: Join Us
signUp.subtitle: Create a free account
signUp.agreement: By signing up, you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}
signUp.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

signUpSuccess.title: Check your email
signUpSuccess.subtitle: We sent a confirmation email to:
signUpSuccess.instruction: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
signUpSuccess.spam: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
signUpSuccess.resendError: Failed to resend. Please wait a moment and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered email address
forgotPassword.successMessage: We sent a password reset link to:
forgotPassword.spam: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.error: Failed to send email. Please check the address.

updatePassword.title: Reset Password
updatePassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
updatePassword.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
updatePassword.error: Failed to update password. Please try again.

dashboard.noCheersDescription: Scan a QR code at an event to send your first cheer

roleUpgrade.title: Join as a Creator
roleUpgrade.description: Apply for Artist or Organizer role

profile.title: Profile
profile.stripeDescription: Stripe Connect registration is required to receive payouts. An agent will guide you through the process in person.
profile.homescreenDescription: Launch the app instantly from your home screen. If you're using Safari, follow these steps:
profile.homescreenStep1: 1. Tap the Share button (square with arrow) at the bottom
profile.homescreenStep2: 2. Select "Add to Home Screen" and tap Add

roleUpgrade.title: Creator Application
roleUpgrade.description: Select your role and apply. An agent will contact you after review.
roleUpgrade.artistDescription: Perform at events and receive support
roleUpgrade.organizerDescription: Host events and issue QR codes
roleUpgrade.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your activities or share your SNS links
roleUpgrade.success: Application received. We'll contact you after review.
